content.page_title: Best Bariatric Surgeons in Ottawa, Ontario (2026)
content.meta_description: Find top-rated bariatric surgeons in Ottawa, ON. Expert weight loss surgery options, OHIP coverage details, and local clinic reviews for 2026.
content.h1: Best Bariatric Surgeons in Ottawa, Ontario
content.intro: If you're considering bariatric surgery in Ottawa, you're taking a major step toward lasting weight loss and better health. We've researched the top bariatric surgeons and clinics in the Ottawa area to help you find the right fit for your weight loss journey.
content.local_context: Ottawa residents have access to excellent bariatric care through both public and private providers. The region benefits from proximity to major teaching hospitals and specialized weight loss centres. OHIP covers bariatric surgery for eligible candidates meeting specific criteria, making it more acce

top_picks.name: The Bariatric Surgery Centre at The Ottawa Hospital
top_picks.tagline: Premier public bariatric program with OHIP coverage
top_picks.description: Ontario's leading bariatric surgery program offering gastric bypass, sleeve gastrectomy, and lap-band procedures. Comprehensive pre- and post-operative support with experienced surgeons and multidisciplinary team. Part of The Ottawa Hospital, a major teaching institution.
cons: Long wait times due to high demand
top_picks.best_for: Patients who qualify for OHIP coverage and prefer public healthcare with strong institutional support

top_picks.name: Wharton Medical Clinic - Ottawa
top_picks.tagline: Medical weight loss and surgical consultation centre
top_picks.description: Full-service weight loss clinic offering both non-surgical and surgical bariatric options. Board-certified physicians provide consultation, pre-operative assessment, and post-operative management. Offers GLP-1 medications, nutrition planning, and surgical referrals.
top_picks.best_for: Patients seeking private bariatric consultation and those wanting to explore non-surgical options first

top_picks.name: Ideal Protein Ottawa
top_picks.tagline: Medically supervised weight loss with surgical referral network
top_picks.description: Medically supervised weight loss clinic with certified nutritionists and nurse practitioners. Offers protein-sparing modified fasting diet, health coaching, and connections to bariatric surgeons. Individualized programs with regular monitoring and support.
pros: Helps determine if surgery is right for you
top_picks.best_for: People exploring weight loss options before committing to surgery and those wanting structured medical supervision

top_picks.name: Dr. Mehran Anvari - Bariatric Surgery Specialist
top_picks.tagline: Experienced bariatric surgeon with private and public practice
top_picks.description: Highly experienced bariatric surgeon offering both OHIP-covered and private bariatric procedures. Specializes in minimally invasive laparoscopic techniques. Provides thorough pre-operative assessment and comprehensive post-operative follow-up care.
top_picks.price_range: Free with OHIP or $8,000-15,000 CAD private
cons: OHIP wait times can be lengthy
top_picks.best_for: Patients wanting experienced specialist care, either through OHIP or private pay

top_picks.name: Herbal Magic - Ottawa Weight Loss Centre
top_picks.tagline: Natural supplement-based weight loss with surgical support
top_picks.description: Holistic weight loss centre combining herbal supplements, meal planning, and lifestyle coaching. Offers bariatric surgery pre-operative preparation and post-operative support. Integrative approach combining natural and medical strategies.
top_picks.best_for: People preferring natural approaches and those preparing for or recovering from bariatric surgery

top_picks.name: Ottawa Bariatric Surgery Clinic - Private Practice
top_picks.tagline: Boutique bariatric surgery clinic with personalized care
top_picks.description: Specialized private bariatric surgery clinic offering personalized surgical consultations and procedures. Focuses on patient education and realistic outcome expectations. Provides detailed pre-operative testing and customized post-operative nutrition protocols.
pros: Personalized attention and shorter wait times
top_picks.best_for: Patients seeking premium private care with minimal wait times and personalized attention

what_to_look_for: Board certification in bariatric surgery and experience with multiple surgical techniques (bypass, sleeve, lap-band)
Comprehensive pre-operative assessment including psychological evaluation, nutritional counselling, and medical clearance
Strong post-operative support program with regular follow-ups, nutrition guidance, and access to support groups
Clear communication about realistic outcomes, potential risks, and long-term lifestyle requirements
OHIP coverage eligibility or transparent private pricing with no hidden fees
Positive patient reviews and testimonials from local Ottawa residents
content.average_cost_context: Ottawa residents may access bariatric surgery free through OHIP if eligible (based on BMI, health conditions, and failed conservative weight loss attempts). Private bariatric surgery typically costs $8,000-18,000 CAD. Medical weight loss programs range from $100-500 monthly.
content.insurance_notes: Ontario Health Insurance Plan (OHIP) covers bariatric surgery for eligible candidates with BMI over 40, or BMI 35+ with obesity-related health conditions, and documented failed conservative weight loss attempts. Referral from your family physician is required. Private insurance may cover some pre-operative assessments. Always confirm coverage with your provider.

faqs.question: Does OHIP cover bariatric surgery in Ottawa?
faqs.answer: Yes, OHIP covers bariatric surgery for eligible patients meeting specific criteria including BMI thresholds, documented health conditions, and failed conservative weight loss attempts. You need a referral from your family physician to access the program.

faqs.question: How long is the wait time for bariatric surgery in Ottawa?
faqs.answer: OHIP-covered bariatric surgery in Ottawa typically has wait times of 6-18 months depending on surgical complexity and current demand. Private surgery can often be scheduled within weeks to a few months.

faqs.question: What is the most popular bariatric surgery procedure in Ottawa?
faqs.answer: Gastric sleeve (sleeve gastrectomy) is the most commonly performed bariatric procedure in Ottawa, followed by gastric bypass. Both are effective and have good safety profiles when performed by experienced surgeons.

faqs.question: Do I need to see a nutritionist before bariatric surgery in Ottawa?
faqs.answer: Yes, all reputable bariatric programs in Ottawa require pre-operative nutritional assessment and counselling. This helps ensure you're ready for dietary changes and helps predict surgical success.

faqs.question: Can I get bariatric surgery revision if my first surgery didn't work?
faqs.answer: Yes, revision bariatric surgery is available in Ottawa through both public and private providers. Success depends on the original procedure and your adherence to post-operative guidelines. Discuss revision options with your surgeon.

faqs.question: What is the cost of private bariatric surgery in Ottawa?
faqs.answer: Private bariatric surgery in Ottawa ranges from $8,000-18,000 CAD depending on the procedure type, surgeon experience, and facility. Gastric sleeve typically costs $10,000-14,000, while gastric bypass is often $12,000-18,000.

faqs.question: How long does recovery take after bariatric surgery in Ottawa?
faqs.answer: Most patients return to light activities within 2-3 weeks and resume normal activities within 4-6 weeks. Full recovery and dietary adaptation typically takes 3-6 months. Your surgeon will provide specific timeline based on your procedure.

faqs.question: Are there support groups for bariatric surgery patients in Ottawa?
faqs.answer: Yes, The Ottawa Hospital and many private clinics offer post-operative support groups. These groups provide peer support, nutrition tips, and motivation. Many meet monthly both in-person and virtually.
